goal: Найти один или несколько ортогональных specialist-сигналов или conditioning-слоёв, которые работают там, где база active-signal-v1@1 не торгует, и доказанно приносят новые входы, а не скрытый дубляж.
global_constraints: База active-signal-v1@1 immutable — не ретюнить, не менять пороги, часы, дни, исполнение.
Сырые event-entry конструкции (один event + один фильтр) запрещены — H1/H2 тупик.
Каждый кандидат сначала проходит complement-first режим: вход только на base_absent anchor-барах.
Single-filter entry запрещён — минимум три логических слоя (новый слой + подтверждение режима + ограничитель плотности).
Model-first запрещён до завершения Wave A (low-friction).
Кандидат отклоняется, если strict additive слабый, а permissive сильный — признак скрытого каннибализма.

slices.title: Feature contract и публикация custom features для wave A
slices.hypothesis: Translate hypothesis ideas into correct causal features with explicit contracts, then validate, publish, and materialize them.
slices.objective: Translate hypothesis ideas into correct causal features with explicit contracts, then validate, publish, and materialize them.
success_criteria: All Wave A features published, causality-checked, and materialized successfully.
evidence_requirements: All Wave A features published, causality-checked, and materialized successfully.

slices.title: Hypothesis plausibility на base-absent surface
slices.hypothesis: Perform early triage of prototypes on the complement surface only, discarding those that show no structured effect where the base is absent.
slices.objective: Perform early triage of prototypes on the complement surface only, discarding those that show no structured effect where the base is absent.
success_criteria: Only plausibility-approved prototypes remain, with visible structure specifically where the base is absent.
evidence_requirements: Only plausibility-approved prototypes remain, with visible structure specifically where the base is absent.

slices.title: Построение strict specialist prototypes
slices.hypothesis: Convert surviving ideas into real signal prototypes with at least three logical layers, avoiding the H1/H2 trap of weak single-filter entries.
slices.objective: Convert surviving ideas into real signal prototypes with at least three logical layers, avoiding the H1/H2 trap of weak single-filter entries.
success_criteria: Small set of strict specialist prototypes exists, not a loose grid of weak filters.
evidence_requirements: Small set of strict specialist prototypes exists, not a loose grid of weak filters.
